message:
feat(gateway): implement supervisor daemon management service

Add complete daemon process management with:
- SupervisorService class with start/stop/restart operations
- Automatic restart policies (always, on-failure, never)
- Health check loops with status tracking
- Log collection with secret redaction
- WebSocket event emission on daemon state changes
- REST API endpoints for daemon control and monitoring

Also fix test isolation by adding logger mocks with .child() method
to multiple test files that were affected by mock pollution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
